name: Gopher Orange Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a syrup by dissolving water and sugar in boiling water.
2. Allow the syrup to cool completely.
3. Add lemon juice and orange juice to the cooled syrup.
4. Freeze the mixture until it is half frozen.
5. Stir in beaten egg white mixed with additional sugar.
6. Continue beating the mixture with ice until thoroughly combined.
7. Complete freezing process and serve.
8. For added flavor and texture, stir in strawberries or pineapple slices (diced) just before serving.
Pineapple Ice: Use canned pineapple juice with equal parts water and sugar syrup, adding diced pineapple just before serving if desired. Always add a tablespoon of lemon juice to enhance flavor and freezing process.
